$comment: Single source of truth for the vendored @effect-native/* snapshot. The monorepo vendors unbuilt TypeScript from OpenAgentsInc/effect-native (not published to npm) as workspace members. This manifest pins the exact upstream commit and catalog version behind every vendored package. The guard test `effect-native-vendor.test.ts` asserts every vendored package.json records THIS commit (no partial bumps) and that the vendored core's CatalogVersion literal equals catalogVersion below. The freshness script `scripts/check-effect-native-vendor-freshness.ts` warns (never hard-fails) when the sibling upstream checkout has moved ahead of this commit. To re-vendor: bump the commit here, re-copy each package's upstream src/**, update each package.json effectNativeVendor.commit, and update catalogVersion.
